title: यीशु मसीह तेरा प्यार
author: Traditional

scriptureRefs.note: But God commendeth his love toward us, in that, while we were yet sinners, Christ died for us
We love him, because he first loved us

story: A deeply moving Hindi bhajan about the sacrificial love of Jesus Christ. Born from the devotional tradition of North Indian Christianity, this hymn meditates on the cross and the incomparable love that led Christ to lay down His life. It is often sung during Lent and Good Friday services.

lines: यीशु मसीह तेरा प्यार अनमोल है
क्रूस पर तूने सब कुछ दे दिया
पापी थे हम फिर भी तूने प्यार किया
यीशु मसीह तेरा प्यार अनमोल है
linesRomanized: Yeshu Masih tera pyaar anmol hai
Kroos par tune sab kuchh de diyaa
Paapi the ham phir bhi tune pyaar kiyaa
Yeshu Masih tera pyaar anmol hai

lines: तेरे लहू से धोए गए हम
तेरी कृपा से बचाए गए हम
यीशु मसीह तेरा प्यार अनमोल है
linesRomanized: Tere lahoo se dhoye gaye ham
Teri krupaa se bachaaye gaye ham
Yeshu Masih tera pyaar anmol hai

lines: संसार में कुछ भी इसकी तुलना नहीं
linesRomanized: Sansaar mein kuchh bhi iski tulnaa nahin
